evidence.claim: Led migration from keyword-based ranking to learning-to-rank model with embedded behavioral signals
evidence.source_text: led the migration from keyword-based ranking to a learning-to-rank model with embedded behavioral signals

evidence.claim: Handled peak QPS of 8K with sub-200ms p95 latency
evidence.source_text: handling peak QPS of 8K with sub-200ms p95

evidence.claim: Owned end-to-end ranking pipeline including BGE-large fine-tuning, Pinecone retrieval, and XGBoost re-scoring
evidence.source_text: Owned the end-to-end ranking pipeline at a recommendations-heavy consumer product: candidate sourcing → embedding generation (using a fine-tuned BGE-large) → Pinecone retrieval → learning-to-rank re-scoring (XGBoost) → behavioral-signal integration.

evidence.claim: Developed calibration approach using simulated A/B tests stable for 18 months
evidence.source_text: After three iterations we landed on a calibration approach using simulated A/B tests that has held up over the last 18 months.

evidence.claim: Fine-tuned LLaMA-2-7B and Mistral-7B using LoRA and QLoRA
evidence.source_text: Fine-tuned LLaMA-2-7B and Mistral-7B variants using LoRA and QLoRA for domain-specific candidate-JD matching.

evidence.claim: Built data curation pipeline generating 200K preference pairs
evidence.source_text: Built the data curation pipeline that generated 200K high-quality preference pairs from recruiter labels

evidence.claim: Deployed model via BentoML on Kubernetes with sub-200ms p95 latency
evidence.source_text: Deployed the model via BentoML on Kubernetes with sub-200ms p95 latency by quantizing to INT8 and batching at the request level.

evidence.claim: Reduced inference cost from $0.04 to under $0.001
evidence.source_text: Cost per inference dropped from $0.04 with GPT-3.5-fallback to under $0.001.

evidence.claim: Designed exploration-exploitation policy using Thompson sampling
evidence.source_text: I designed an exploration-exploitation policy using Thompson sampling

evidence.claim: Improved new-user retention by 11% in the first month
evidence.source_text: improved new-user retention by 11% in the first month.

evidence.claim: Led migration and owned end-to-end intelligence layers
evidence.source_text: I led the migration... I can own the intelligence layer end-to-end.

evidence.claim: Obtained Google Cloud Professional ML Engineer certification
evidence.source_text: Google Cloud Professional ML Engineer (Google Cloud, 2024)

evidence.claim: Prioritizes feature engineering and rigorous evaluation over model size
evidence.source_text: I believe most ranking problems are solved by careful feature engineering and rigorous eval, not by bigger models.
